# H1 alpha

## H2 child

Body. structural_path = `h1[1]/h2[1]`.

# H1 beta

## H2 child

Body. structural_path = `h1[2]/h2[1]`.

Pre-D27 `occurrence_index_at_level` formula collided these two H2s — both
had occurrence-index 1 at level 2. D27's full-ancestor-chain hash gives
them distinct stable_ids.
